'''Vykos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vykos system/Legends|Vykos system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a stopping point on the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]] of the luxury liner [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], a planet of fast-flowing rivers (such as the [[Tueinami]]) which attacted white-water rapid rafters and deep canyons (such as the [[Grand Aderian Range]], a kilometer deep).

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}}
